entities.name: DECENTRALIZATION
entities.description: Reforms aimed at strengthening democracy by promoting political participation among citizens

entities.name: DEMOCRACY
entities.description: The system of government that decentralization reforms aim to strengthen

entities.name: POLITICAL PARTICIPATION
entities.description: The involvement of citizens in political activities, promoted by decentralization

entities.name: INFORMATION
entities.description: A prerequisite for political participation, the acquisition of which can be hampered by private costs

entities.name: PRIVATE COSTS
entities.description: Costs faced by individuals in acquiring information, which can hamper the acquisition of knowledge on decentralization

entities.name: TSIMANE'
entities.description: An indigenous population of lowland Bolivia surveyed to analyze the reach of decentralization

entities.name: BOLIVIAN AMAZON
entities.description: The geographic region where the study on the Tsimane' people was conducted

entities.name: MUNICIPAL TOWNS
entities.description: Urban centers whose proximity correlates with higher awareness of decentralization

entities.name: SCHOOLING
entities.description: Educational attainment that correlates with higher awareness of decentralization

entities.name: MARKET ECONOMY
entities.description: Economic system whose participation correlates with higher awareness of decentralization

entities.name: POLITICAL KNOWLEDGE
entities.description: Knowledge about decentralization reforms and their potential benefits

entities.name: DECENTRALIZATION LAWS
entities.description: The legal framework establishing decentralization reforms
